title: How decisions get recorded
question: How do decisions reliably get saved without trusting the AI to remember them all later?
rationale: Capture each decision the moment it's made — draft it and have you confirm before saving — so the AI can't misremember after the fact. An end-of-session check only suggests anything missed; it never saves on its own.

tradeoffs.note: nothing is saved without your approval
captured while the reasoning is fresh
a quick confirm for each decision

options.label: Approve a summary at the end

tradeoffs.note: you check the batch, but it relies on the AI's recall
you must trust the AI to recall it correctly

options.label: Type every decision in by hand

tradeoffs.note: easy to forget in the moment
